videos.title: Grok 4.5 EXPOSED: The Truth Elon Musk Didn't Tell You (Full Analysis)
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 4.5 EXPOSED: The Truth Elon Musk Didn't Tell You (Full Analysis) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Is Grok 4.5 really the AI breakthrough Elon Musk claims it is?

Instead of repeating launch-day headlines, I examined the official xAI documentation, developer API docs, independent benchmark results, Artificial Analysis rankings, and real developer feedback to separate marketing from measurable performance.

In this deep-dive you'll learn:

✔ What actually launched on July 8
✔ The official xAI claims
✔ What the benchmarks really say
✔ Independent evaluations
✔ Developer experiences after launch
✔ The "minimal hallucinations" claim nobody can verify
✔ Why enterprise buyers should pay attention
✔ Whether Grok 4.5 is actually worth using

This isn't another hype video.

It's an evidence-based breakdown of Grok 4.5, its strengths, weaknesses, benchmark performance, coding abilities, pricing, transparency, safety documentation, and how it compares with GPT-5.5, Claude Opus, and other frontier AI models.

If you enjoy thoughtful AI analysis without marketing spin, subscribe for future breakdowns of every major AI release.


TIMESTAMPS

videos.title: Stop Trying To Hold Lag. It’s Why You Can’t Compress Your Irons
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Trying To Hold Lag. It’s Why You Can’t Compress Your Irons ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=13.07.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=13.07.26

If you struggle with casting, flipping, or releasing the golf club too early, trying to “hold the lag” in your downswing could actually be making the problem worse.
In this lesson with Roger, we look at why his shaft was leaning back at impact and how changing what happened through and after the golf ball helped him create a much better impact position without trying to force shaft lean.
You’ll see why the way you release the club through the ball can dramatically influence what happens before impact, and why a better release can help you create more lag, better shaft lean, and a more consistent strike.
If you’ve been trying to hold lag, drag the handle, or stop flipping the club, this lesson will give you a very different way to think about your downswing.

videos.title: Tangem Wallet Laser Attack Explained: Competitor Ledger Found Vulnerability (What You Need to Know)
videos.summary_source_text:
Tangem Wallet Laser Attack Explained: Competitor Ledger Found Vulnerability (What You Need to Know) ⚠️ FULL DISCLOSURE: Tangem is a sponsor of this channel and I promote their products. I made this video the same way I would if they were not a sponsor. Ledger — a direct competitor — published research showing they broke into a Tangem card with a laser. Here's exactly what they found, exactly how Tangem responded, and where I think both companies are spinning it.

Read the primary sources yourself. Don't take my word for it:
🔬 Ledger Donjon research: https://donjon.ledger.com/blog/bypassing-tangem-card-security-with-laser-attack/
🛡️ Tangem's official response: https://tangem.com/en/blog/post/lfi-response/

THE SHORT VERSION:
Ledger found a flaw that cannot be patched and affects every Tangem card in circulation. Disabling password recovery does NOT protect you. It also requires physically stealing your card, roughly $250,000 in lab equipment, hardware-security experts, and it destroys the card in the process. There have been zero documented real-world losses from this class of attack on any hardware wallet, ever.

Both of those things are true at the same time. Serious — and not a reason to panic.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 - Ledger Laser Attacked Tangem
00:32 - How the Laser Attack Actually Works
01:30 - The Uncomfortable Facts
02:15 - The Reassuring Facts
03:00 - How Tangem Responded
04:09 - Where BOTH Companies are Spinning It
04:45 - Where Tangem Was Soft on Facts
05:40 - What This Actually Means for You
07:20 - What I'm Watching Next
07:47 - The Bottom Line

🔑 IF YOU TAKE ONE THING AWAY:
This changes the risk of a LOST OR STOLEN card. If your card goes missing and you hold meaningful funds — move them to new keys. Don't assume the password is enough anymore. If your card is still in your pocket, your day-to-day risk barely moved. The things actually draining wallets right now are phishing, fake apps, and malicious contracts — not lasers.

📌 On the sponsorship: Tangem is a sponsor of this channel. That's a real conflict of interest, not a throwaway line. My rule is simple — when something bad comes out about a sponsor, I cover it the same way I would if they weren't a sponsor. If I ever can't do that, I'll drop the sponsorship, not the story. Hold me to it in the comments.

⚖️ Nothing in this video is financial or security advice. This is an educational breakdown of publicly available security research. Do your own research and make your own decisions.

videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 4.5 Deep Dive: Architecture, Benchmarks, Limitations & Who Should Use It Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Is Grok 4.5 actually the AI breakthrough Elon Musk claims it is?

In this in-depth analysis, we go beyond the marketing and examine the official documentation, benchmarks, architecture, pricing, training data, limitations, and real-world capabilities of xAI's newest flagship model.

Instead of repeating social media hype, this video compares what xAI officially documents with independent evidence to help developers, AI enthusiasts, founders, and researchers understand where Grok 4.5 truly stands against GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, Claude Opus 4.8, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and Llama 4.

You'll learn:

✅ What Grok 4.5 actually is
✅ Its architecture and Mixture-of-Experts design
✅ Training data and why the timeline raises questions
✅ Context window, reasoning modes, and tool stack
✅ Benchmark results explained honestly
✅ Grok 4.5 vs GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini & Llama
✅ Hidden limitations most reviewers ignore
✅ Who should actually use Grok 4.5

Whether you're choosing an AI model for coding agents, research workflows, enterprise deployment, or software development, this breakdown will help you make an informed decision.

videos.title: How Tough is Royal Birkdale? | The 154th Open | On The Road W/ Iona Stephen
videos.summary_source_text:
How Tough is Royal Birkdale? | The 154th Open | On The Road W/ Iona Stephen The 154th Open is upon us so now is the perfect chance to take a look at five of the toughest holes at Royal Birkdale.  

For this round, I’m joined by Course Manager Sean McLean to get the inside scoop on the five toughest holes on the Southport coast, the changes made to the course and the preparation that goes into hosting The Open. There’s nobody better to show us around this elegant and thoughtful golf course. 

And a big thank you to my caddie Paul whose seven years of knowledge of Royal Birkdale was invaluable, especially in a testing wind. 

Brought to you by Titleist.
#titleist #golf #The154thOpen #R&A #LinksGolf #RoyalBirkdale

videos.title: I’m Completely Changing My Practice. Here’s Why You Should Too.
videos.summary_source_text:
I’m Completely Changing My Practice. Here’s Why You Should Too. Ever wonder why it's so hard to take your range game to the course? In this video, we compare my range swing quality numbers against actual on-course results at Praia D'El Rey to show why your driving range swing disappears on the 1st tee.

We've all been there: you are hitting it pure on the launch monitor or practice mat, but the moment you step onto a real golf hole, the scoring consistency vanishes. The truth is, there is a massive gap between hitting a good golf shot on the range and actually playing the game of golf under real-world conditions.

Watch as I test a new "controlled takeaway" swing feel on the back nine in Portugal, while tracking a fascinating metric: my perceived "range quality" rating versus the actual result on the course. The drop-off in my approach shot data at the end of the round completely blew my mind—and it proves that 90% of amateurs are practicing completely wrong.

videos.title: The BEST Putter We've Ever Reviewed!
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Putter We've Ever Reviewed! Rick Shiels tests the brand-new L.A.B. Golf VZN.1i putter to see whether its unusual design and zero-torque technology can deliver on the greens. Could this genuinely be the best putter we’ve ever reviewed?


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack

videos.title: Should you buy new or used golf clubs 🤔
videos.summary_source_text:
Should you buy new or used golf clubs 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: DRAMATIC Finish in Scotland | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open
videos.summary_source_text:
DRAMATIC Finish in Scotland | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Watch the drama unfold in Back 9 on Sunday, presented by Nexo, as Tom Kim clinched his maiden DP World Tour title in style. Tom Kim held off the challenge of Min Woo Lee and European Ryder Cup stars Rory McIlroy and Robert MacIntyre to secure a two-shot victory after beginning the final round in a tie for fourth.

The victory guarantees Kim an invite to the Masters Tournament in 2027, a tournament he has previously played three times (2023, 2024 and 2025).

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | ISCO Championship | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | ISCO Championship | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the 2026 ISCO Championship, featuring Steven Fisk, Lucas Glover, Taylor Pendrith and Max Homa, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads to Kentucky this week for the ISCO Championship, co-sanctioned with the DP World Tour for the fifth consecutive year. As one of the final events before the FedExCup Playoffs approach, valuable points are on offer at Hurstbourne Country Club, with a blend of established PGA TOUR winners, rising stars and international talent making up the field. Max Homa headlines the field after finishing runner-up at the John Deere Classic, his best result of the 2026 season. Defending champion William Mouw returns looking to become the first player to successfully defend the ISCO Championship, while major champion Lucas Glover also tees it up after contending late into last week's event. Harry Higgs is back in action alongside more than 40 DP World Tour members, led by Christiaan Bezuidenhout. The tournament also features an exciting group of emerging talent, including Jackson Koivun, Luke Clanton, Ben James and Gordon Sargent, while 17-year-old amateur Miles Russell headlines the sponsor exemptions after another impressive season. NCAA champion Preston Stout also arrives in Kentucky fresh off a top-15 finish at the John Deere Classic. With 300 FedExCup points on the line and one of the final opportunities to climb the standings before the closing stretch of the season, the ISCO Championship promises another competitive week as PGA TOUR and DP World Tour players battle for a breakthrough victory in Kentucky.

videos.title: This New Golf Swing Technique Made Him Look Like A Tour Pro
videos.summary_source_text:
This New Golf Swing Technique Made Him Look Like A Tour Pro In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno fixes pulls and fades — and gets a golfer drawing the ball in five minutes.

⏱️ Timestamps:
🔍 0:00 - Eric Cogorno: fixing pulls and fades in a live golf lesson
💡 0:54 - Why an open shoulder line causes a steep downswing and pull fades
🎯 1:43 - The alignment stick drill for controlling follow through direction
📐 3:20 - How to close the shoulder line at setup to shallow the swing path
💪 4:31 - Dry rehearsal: halfway back to arms parallel with face rotation
⛳ 5:22 - How closed shoulders shallow the angle of attack and eliminate pulls
🔄 6:08 - Feeling the right shoulder tuck and lead forearm position at setup
🏆 20:30 - Adding right side depth in the backswing for an inside-out swing path
🚀 23:00 - Taking the same feels to driver for more distance and less weak right shots

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON!
Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available!
📞 Call or text us at ‪(610) 756-7730‬ to discuss if our golf schools are a good fit for you.

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP
The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING
Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS
Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

⭐ OUR AWESOME PARTNERS AND DISCOUNT CODES ⭐
🏌️ Takomo Golf Clubs - https://takomogolf.com
👕 Bobby Jones Apparel: https://bobbyjones.com/COGORNO
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🧥 Sunice Apparel: https://sunice.com/COGORNO
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🎯 Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
⛳ theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

If you struggle with pulls, over fades, or weak shots to the right, these high handicap golf tips are going to change how you think about your setup and downswing. In this golf instruction lesson, Eric Cogorno works with a student fighting a steep over-the-top move and fixes his miss pattern in minutes — the student was drawing the ball within five minutes of making two simple changes. The fix starts with closing the shoulder line at setup and adding right side depth in the backswing. These golf drills can be practiced at the range immediately and apply to any golfer who wants to stop pulling it left and start swinging from the inside. If you leave this video without trying the closed shoulder drill, you're leaving distance and consistency on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why an open shoulder line at setup causes a steep downswing and pull fades
• How closing the shoulder line at setup automatically shallows the swing path
• High handicap golf tips for eliminating pulls and weak fades with two setup changes
• The alignment stick drill for training the correct follow through direction
• How to feel the right shoulder tuck and correct lead forearm position at setup
• The halfway back to arms parallel drill for training face rotation through impact
• Why a deeper right-side turn in the backswing makes inside-out golf instruction feel natural
• How to take the same golf swing feels to driver for more distance and less weak right shots

The #1 Best Remedy to Get Rid of Tartar Find out how to get rid of tartar naturally by targeting the biofilm that causes it. Tartar isn’t just hardened plaque, it’s a calcium-protected biofilm created by bacteria living on your teeth. The goal isn’t simply to scrape it away, but to help break down the biofilm and support a healthier oral environment.

🌟Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4fx3IxZ

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

To get rid of tartar, mix ½ teaspoon of baking soda with a few drops of 3% hydrogen peroxide to make a paste, then apply it to your teeth. Hydrogen peroxide helps break down the biofilm, while baking soda helps raise the pH in your mouth. Reducing sugar and starches also helps create an environment that’s less favorable for the microbes that contribute to plaque and tartar buildup.

videos.title: OFFSEASON STORYLINES! 3 Carolina Hurricanes Offseason Storylines
videos.summary_source_text:
OFFSEASON STORYLINES! 3 Carolina Hurricanes Offseason Storylines As we get deeper into the offseason, what are some storylines for the Carolina Hurricanes as they're almost a month away from winning the Stanley Cup? What should fans keep an eye on as we slowly get closer to the 2026-27 season? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on what the Hurricanes will do with Jesperi Kotkaniemi. Over the last couple of weeks, he was at the 1/3rd buyout limit, but now, he is set to make over $1 million per season if bought out. If he is not bought out, what can the Hurricanes do to move him if a trade is the way to go? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the Hurricanes waiting out the Alexander Nikishin contract situation, as there has been no updated progress. Is it better to sign him closer to what he wants, or is it something to look into when it comes to a trade? What does a sensible trade look like if he is not signed? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes are possibly going into the upcoming season running it back with the same roster. That said, does it make sense to do so? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Honda Super-N Review: It proves UK rules are STUPID!
videos.summary_source_text:
Honda Super-N Review: It proves UK rules are STUPID! This is our in-depth review of the Honda Super N. We’ll review the design, the interior, what it’s like to drive, and whether Honda made the right choice by making it electric. 

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://www.carvertical.com/carwow

This is the Honda Super N! 

This miniature maestro is based on Honda’s Japanese market N-One e kei car, but it’s been scaled up for the UK and European market. 

The thing is, can this tiny EV with a super small price tag offer real competition to more established small EVs such as the Renault 5? Let’s take a closer look. 

Starting with the design, there’s no denying that the Super-N has real presence on the road, despite its small size. The boxy design helps it stand out, and it’s only available in one colour - the purple you see in this video! The front end really exemplifies the boxy nature of the car, and along the side, the flared wheel arches give it even more presence. Around the back, there’s a small spoiler to make you think this could be a real pocket rocket. 

However, that’s not really the case. The Super-N is powered by a single electric motor driving the front wheels, and this only delivers 64hp. There is a boost button to help increase power for a small duration, but this only boosts output to 95hp. What’s more, the battery is small, with the Super-N only having a range of up to 120 miles! 

On the inside, the Super-N’s build quality is aligned with its small price tag. There’s plastic across the dash, with the majority of the materials within the car cheap to the touch. There’s an infotainment screen, which, while relatively basic, at least comes with Apple CarPlay & Android Auto, and the digital dials screen is small but does what it’s supposed to do. 

So the Honda Super-N rolls up with a cost of just £18,995, but does it really offer good value for money? And did Honda make a mistake only selling it as an EV? Stick with Mat to see for yourself!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1307

20:20 Verdict: Best Small Electric Car? This is our in-depth review of the Honda Super N. We’ll review the design, the interior, what it’s like to drive, and whether Honda made the right choice by making it electric. 

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://www.carvertical.com/carwow

This is the Honda Super N! 

This miniature maestro is based on Honda’s Japanese market N-One e kei car, but it’s been scaled up for the UK and European market. 

The thing is, can this tiny EV with a super small price tag offer real competition to more established small EVs such as the Renault 5? Let’s take a closer look. 

Starting with the design, there’s no denying that the Super-N has real presence on the road, despite its small size. The boxy design helps it stand out, and it’s only available in one colour - the purple you see in this video! The front end really exemplifies the boxy nature of the car, and along the side, the flared wheel arches give it even more presence. Around the back, there’s a small spoiler to make you think this could be a real pocket rocket. 

However, that’s not really the case. The Super-N is powered by a single electric motor driving the front wheels, and this only delivers 64hp. There is a boost button to help increase power for a small duration, but this only boosts output to 95hp. What’s more, the battery is small, with the Super-N only having a range of up to 120 miles! 

On the inside, the Super-N’s build quality is aligned with its small price tag. There’s plastic across the dash, with the majority of the materials within the car cheap to the touch. There’s an infotainment screen, which, while relatively basic, at least comes with Apple CarPlay & Android Auto, and the digital dials screen is small but does what it’s supposed to do. 

So the Honda Super-N rolls up with a cost of just £18,995, but does it really offer good value for money? And did Honda make a mistake only selling it as an EV? Stick with Mat to see for yourself!

videos.title: 473. Skuldsatt: när obetalda lån blev en lysande affärsidé | Med Lena Pettersson
videos.summary_source_text:
473. Skuldsatt: när obetalda lån blev en lysande affärsidé | Med Lena Pettersson Fyra av fem som ansöker om skuldsanering gör det inte på grund av överdriven shopping. För de flesta handlar det om arbetslöshet, sjukdom eller skilsmässa. Ändå tycker vi många gånger att de borde skylla sig själva. 

Det är vad dagens avsnitt med journalisten Lena Pettersson tar upp. Avsnittet handlar om betalningsmoral, vår syn på skuld, fördomar och helt galna siffror som att dödligheten bland dem på skuldsanering är 30 gånger högre än andra.

Det här är inte ett avsnitt om personer som hamnat i Lyxfällan. Det är ett avsnitt om hur vårt kreditsystem, ända ner på lagstiftningsnivå, är riggat mot dem som halkar över kanten. Och om varför avståndet mellan oss med ordnad ekonomi och dem som fastnat i skulder är betydligt mindre än vi vill tro och hur vi som samhälle tycker att de som dragit på sig skulder får skylla sig själva. Trots att ganska mycket faktiskt är riggat mot dem.

Det här blev för mig lika mycket ett samtal om empati som om ekonomi. Avståndet mellan oss med ordnad ekonomi och dem som fastnat i skulder är mycket mindre än vi vill tro.

Några av ämnena vi tar upp i veckans avsnitt är:

• Varför fyra av fem överskuldsatta inte har shoppat ihjäl sig
• Avräkningsregeln: mekaniken som får skulden att växa fast du betalar
• Hur dåliga lån blev en lysande affärsidé, och vad Klarna sa 2012
• Varför Kronofogden driver in även bluffakturor och ockerräntor
• Betalningsmoralens rötter i folkrörelser och skötsamhetsideal
• Vad åren i skuld gör med hälsan
• Skuldsanering i siffror, och varför så få beviljas
• Vad räntetaket från 2025 faktiskt ändrar, och vad som inte ändras
• Lenas slutsats: se krediten som en farlig vara

Vi hoppas att du gillar avsnittet,
Jan, Caroline och Lena

videos.title: Avalanche Nation Seems to Have Growing Concern Heading Into a New Season
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Nation Seems to Have Growing Concern Heading Into a New Season Colorado Avalanche fans voice growing concern as the upcoming NHL season approaches—will Cale Makar’s contract extension wrap up before the ice drops, and is the roster ready for another Stanley Cup push? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson tackle urgent mailbag questions, examining the ripple effects of blockbuster signings like Anaheim’s matched $18 million offer sheet and what it means for Makar’s negotiations.

The conversation heats up with bold takes on trade lists—where would you refuse to play, and which NHL destinations top the wish list? Expect passionate takes on Dallas, Detroit, and Vegas, plus a spirited debate about whether the Avalanche should accept a playoff deep run or stay locked on “Cup or Bust” expectations. With insights into fan psychology, cap challenges, and the unpredictable nature of NHL roster-building, this episode serves up a sharp, fan-driven analysis of the Colorado Avalanche’s path forward.

Jerome Miron-Imagn Images

videos.title: This Tech CEO Is Building the “Linux of AI”
videos.summary_source_text:
This Tech CEO Is Building the “Linux of AI” The next big AI battle isn’t about who has the biggest model. It’s about where the AI actually runs.

@qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon told me the future of AI is distributed — where AI runs wherever it makes the most sense.

Sometimes that’s in the cloud, on your phone, your car, your PC, your wearable, or the edge device right in front of you.

And Qualcomm is betting big on powering that entire system.

From Dragonfly C1000 for AI data centers, to High Bandwidth Compute for more efficient inference, to the Modular acquisition that Cristiano says could become “the Linux of AI,” Qualcomm is trying to make AI run across basically everything.

So the next era of AI may not be one app you open on one device.

It may be intelligence spread across the entire computing system.

#Ad #AI #futuretech #SponsoredByQualcomm The next big AI battle isn’t about who has the biggest model. It’s about where the AI actually runs.

GPT 5.6 Mystery, New 2.7T AI, DeepSeek New AI Chip, Orca World Model, Grok 4.5 and More AI News... This week, OpenAI launched GPT-5.6, claimed Sol solved a 50-year-old math conjecture, and revealed that it helped post-train Luna. SpaceXAI released Grok 4.5, Meta launched Muse Spark before pulling a controversial Instagram AI feature, and ByteDance unveiled Seedream 5.0 Pro. Meanwhile, MiniMax prepared a 2.7 trillion parameter model, DeepSeek started building its own chip, China considered restricting frontier AI exports, and BAAI introduced Orca, a model designed to predict what happens next.

videos.title: Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Highlights from the final round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Tom Kim wins first title in 1,001 days! | Round 4 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Tom Kim wins first title in 1,001 days! | Round 4 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026 In the final round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, Tom Kim shoots a 6-under, bogey-free 64 to get to 17-under par, claiming his first PGA TOUR victory in 1,001 days. The two-shot win in Scotland is Kim's fourth PGA TOUR title overall.

The PGA TOUR heads across the Atlantic this week for the Genesis Scottish Open, where one of the strongest fields of the season assembles at The Renaissance Club for the final tune-up ahead of The Open Championship. Co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour, the event returns to the East Lothian venue for the eighth consecutive year. Defending champion Chris Gotterup arrives in Scotland riding plenty of momentum after winning the John Deere Classic, his third victory of the 2026 season, and will look to become the first player to successfully defend the Genesis Scottish Open title. Rory McIlroy also returns to one of his favourite venues, having finished T2, T4 and first over the past three editions, while World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler begins his Open Championship preparations after another remarkable season that has featured nine top-10 finishes in 14 starts. Major champions Aaron Rai and Wyndham Clark are also in the field, with Rai returning to the site of his 2020 victory and Clark looking to continue a superb run of form following his second U.S. Open title. Matt Fitzpatrick, Tommy Fleetwood and Scotland's own Robert MacIntyre further strengthen a field that features six of the world's top 10 players. With 500 FedExCup points on offer and many of the game's biggest names making their final competitive start before The Open Championship, the Genesis Scottish Open once again promises to deliver one of the highlights of the summer golf calendar.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the final round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, featuring Rory McIlory, Tom Kim, Matt Fitzpatrick and Min Woo Lee, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads across the Atlantic this week for the Genesis Scottish Open, where one of the strongest fields of the season assembles at The Renaissance Club for the final tune-up ahead of The Open Championship. Co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour, the event returns to the East Lothian venue for the eighth consecutive year. Defending champion Chris Gotterup arrives in Scotland riding plenty of momentum after winning the John Deere Classic, his third victory of the 2026 season, and will look to become the first player to successfully defend the Genesis Scottish Open title. Rory McIlroy also returns to one of his favourite venues, having finished T2, T4 and first over the past three editions, while World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler begins his Open Championship preparations after another remarkable season that has featured nine top-10 finishes in 14 starts. Major champions Aaron Rai and Wyndham Clark are also in the field, with Rai returning to the site of his 2020 victory and Clark looking to continue a superb run of form following his second U.S. Open title. Matt Fitzpatrick, Tommy Fleetwood and Scotland's own Robert MacIntyre further strengthen a field that features six of the world's top 10 players. With 500 FedExCup points on offer and many of the game's biggest names making their final competitive start before The Open Championship, the Genesis Scottish Open once again promises to deliver one of the highlights of the summer golf calendar.

This Water Lie Could Send You to the Hospital How much water do you really need to drink?

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4v4zSpj

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

For decades, we’ve been told to drink 8 glasses of water a day, but where did that number actually come from, and is it even based on science?

In this video, we break down the “great water lie” and explore what current research and real-world evidence suggest about hydration, electrolytes, and overall fluid balance in the body.

Watch until the end to understand what true hydration actually looks like—and how to avoid common mistakes.

#watermyth #hydration #overhydration #waterintoxication #hydrationfacts #healthmyths #healthtips #water #dehydration #hyponatremia

videos.title: DRINK 1 TABLESPOON OF EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL BEFORE BED... HERE'S WHAT HAPPENS | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
DRINK 1 TABLESPOON OF EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL BEFORE BED... HERE'S WHAT HAPPENS | Dr. Mandell Have you ever wondered why so many people are taking a tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil before bed? In this video, Dr. Mandell explains the science behind this growing nighttime health habit and what really happens inside your body while you sleep. Learn how extra virgin olive oil, one of the cornerstones of the Mediterranean diet, provides heart-healthy monounsaturated fats and powerful antioxidant polyphenols that support cardiovascular health, healthy blood vessels, and protection against oxidative stress. You'll also discover how taking olive oil before bedtime may help reduce late-night cravings, promote satiety, support healthy digestion and bowel regularity in some people, and become an easy habit to maintain as part of your evening routine. We also compare taking olive oil in the morning versus at night, explaining the physiological differences between beginning your day after an overnight fast and consuming it before your body's longest natural period of rest and recovery. Dr. Mandell discusses what current research supports, what it doesn't, how much to take, the best type of extra virgin olive oil to choose, who should use caution, and why consistency is far more important than the time of day. If you're looking for simple, evidence-based ways to improve your overall health naturally, this video will help you make an informed decision. Remember, small healthy habits practiced consistently often lead to the greatest long-term health benefits.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: 3 ingredients! Muscle protein! In 5 minutes! NO sugar! No diets!
videos.summary_source_text:
3 ingredients! Muscle protein! In 5 minutes! NO sugar! No diets! 3 ingredients! Protein for muscles! In 5 minutes! NO sugar! No dieting! Protein for muscles! A healthy 🌱 recipe for making protein chips. Healthy, quick, and delicious!

1 cup (200 g) cooked or canned chickpeas.
1 cup (240 ml) water.
1/4 cup (30 g) protein powder.
2 tbsp unsweetened cocoa powder.
A healthier way to beat that sweet-and-crunchy craving — high in protein, no added sugar, and so simple to make.

Got a slice? Stop scrollin’! 🍌 Before you drop some dollars on the latest driver - here are 3 quick and simple tips to adjust what you already have in the bag.

A lesson never hurts friends...

BUT if you’re in a pinch and about to head out for your weekend round or get stuck in a rut on the back 9 try these out and let me know how it goes.

1️⃣ Adjust to More Upright
2️⃣ Add Some Loft
3️⃣ Move Your Weight to the Heel

Hit ‘em straight, and remember to always #GolfSmarter 🧠

📲 Share this with a friend who needs it!

videos.title: I Built A Traditional Timber Roof By Hand
videos.summary_source_text:
I Built A Traditional Timber Roof By Hand Did you see my new product at the end of the video? I've restocked everything on my website:
https://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

Finally, the roof is in place. It's secured with wooden pegs, using no metal fasteners. The only material besides wood is the clay roof tiles, the same as on my log cabin. I'm very pleased with the result and can't wait to build the traditional cooking setup under the roof in the next videos.

In the video I’m using my pans from Kockums Jernverk, made in Sweden from high-quality Swedish steel. They create a natural non-stick surface and work just as well over an open fire as they do in your kitchen. It’s craftsmanship I truly believe in, made with the same values I stand for. I’m proud to represent them.

Get the same pan here:
👉 https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/kolstalsstekpannor/stekpanna-o28-cm
25% off using code grankvist25 (code is only for Sweden, Norway and Finland)

🌳🪵 A massive thank you to Revolution Race for the clothes that you know I am always wearing.
Get the same clothes here: https://bit.ly/4nkgMZw
Use code GRANKVIST20 for 20% off!

____

My own website: http://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

I hand-craft my own cutting boards in the log cabin. I can only make a few at a time, so you have to be first to buy one when a new batch is released. They are made from hard nordic oak, making them extremely durable, holding up for a lifetime of abuse. Instead of having a plastic cutting board that really should be thrown away after 2 years.

I was told that my dream of selling handmade products wouldn’t work in today's world where everything is mass produced. I want to prove them wrong. My goal is to expand into other handmade products. Making a series of lifetime quality handmade goods. Breaking free from mass production, supporting our environment.

Entire Map of Business in 41 Minutes FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS (FAQ) 👇
🚀 CAN YOU HELP ME START A YOUTUBE CHANNEL LIKE YOURS? 
 I’ve put together a step-by-step roadmap showing exactly how I grew and scaled this channel to 10+ Languages and made over $1.7 Million dollars. Get the Playbook here: https://littlebitbetter-playbook.web.app/ 
🎧 HOW DO YOU FINISH 1 BOOK A WEEK?
 I don’t read, I listen! The secret is to only listen to books that solve a problem you are facing right now. It keeps you hooked while you commute or do chores. Get your first book 100% FREE with an Audible Trial: https://amzn.to/4fFIJrZ

The Heavy Leg Fix No One Is Talking About Most hockey players who feel their legs die mid-shift assume it's a cardio problem, so they go do more bike work, run more sprints, push their VO2 max higher, and then get right back on the ice and gas out again. 

VO2 max and leg strength are only part of the equation. There's a completely separate variable that determines how efficiently your body uses that fitness, and if you're getting that variable wrong, no amount of cardio work will fix it.

videos.title: The MOST Dangerous Sign of Dementia
videos.summary_source_text:
The MOST Dangerous Sign of Dementia The earliest sign of dementia may not be memory loss. Research has found that changes can occur years before cognitive symptoms appear, and one of the strongest early indicators may be a decline in the sense of smell.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4xm6ahK

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Other early changes include:
• Slower reaction times
• Reduced problem-solving ability
• Slightly weaker grip strength
• Impaired sense of smell

A simple at-home test is to identify common spices with your eyes closed. Difficulty recognizing scents may be worth discussing with your doctor, although other factors, such as zinc deficiency, can also affect smell.

#dementia #dementiaprevention #cognitivehealth #brain #alzheimer #memoryproblems

videos.title: Why You Don’t Need So Many Swing Thoughts #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Don’t Need So Many Swing Thoughts #golfswing #golftips Good iron compression comes from reaching a strong impact position — with the body moving toward the target, lag maintained, and the clubface squaring naturally. While all of these matter, trying to focus on everything during one swing often leads to worse contact. The key is identifying the one piece your swing needs most and committing to that.
If you’re unsure what that priority is, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you a clear structure for iron play and every part of your game, helping you focus on what actually moves the needle. videos.title: 8 Hours of Sleep and Still Exhausted? Fix It FAST Tonight
videos.summary_source_text:
8 Hours of Sleep and Still Exhausted? Fix It FAST Tonight Are you exhausted every day, even after sleeping 8 hours? Discover how to sleep better with proven deep sleep tips that help to improve sleep quality naturally so you can stop waking up tired.

0:00 Why am I still tired after sleeping 8 hours?
0:48 Temperature and sleep quality 
1:49 Core body temperature sleep tips
2:40 Light and sleep
4:37 Snacking before bed 
5:25 Natural sleep remedies 
8:21 Early morning sun exposure  
8:54 More deep sleep tips 
9:20 Nasal breathing for deep sleep 
9:50 The benefits of better sleep 

🌟Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4fvD3lb

Learn more about supporting deep sleep so you can wake up feeling refreshed:
▶️ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8hqOmd7GGGY 
▶️ https://youtu.be/ZKAH3GGq2cg
▶️ https://youtu.be/xyBOSZVKpNM

Want to dive deeper? Check out this article on the connection between sleep and vitamin D:
https://drbrg.co/4yfCzXV

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Sleep quality is just as important as the number of hours you sleep. Light, sound, air quality, temperature, and what you eat before bed all affect your sleep quality.

As you fall asleep, your core body temperature naturally drops by 2–3 degrees. Keeping your bedroom between 60–67°F can support this natural cooling process, making it easier to fall asleep and stay in a deep sleep.

Dim the lights 2–3 hours before bed, avoid blue light and LED lights in the evening, and eliminate small light sources in the bedroom. These simple changes can help improve sleep quality.

Snacking before bed can spike blood sugar and contribute to blood sugar fluctuations throughout the night, making it harder to get restorative sleep.

The benefits of deep sleep include better memory, improved brain waste removal, increased growth hormone, stronger immune function, and more stable blood sugar, all of which can help you stop waking up feeling tired.

videos.title: Right Shoulder Plane Drill To Stop Slicing – Blue Brick
videos.summary_source_text:
Right Shoulder Plane Drill To Stop Slicing – Blue Brick Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. If you're battling a slice, the fix isn't your grip or your stance — it's how your right shoulder moves in transition.

This video shows you exactly how an over-the-top right shoulder move sends your hands and club left, causing that classic slice pattern, and what the correct move feels like instead.

You'll learn a simple checkpoint using a stick across your collarbones to know instantly whether your shoulders are on-plane or coming over the top, so you can start hitting it dead straight or drawing it on command.

Like this video if you're done slicing it, and check the link in my bio for your own Blue Brick.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: Conor McGregor's Knee Injury Revealed (HERE'S WHAT HAPPENED)
videos.summary_source_text:
Conor McGregor's Knee Injury Revealed (HERE'S WHAT HAPPENED) Conor McGregor’s long-awaited return to the Octagon ended in devastating fashion tonight when his knee buckled during the opening moments of his UFC 329 rematch against Max Holloway.

McGregor attempted a jumping roundhouse kick, came down awkwardly on the supporting leg and immediately appeared to lose stability in the knee. He tried to continue, but the leg could no longer support him and the fight was stopped just 69 seconds into the first round.

UFC President Dana White said following the fight that the initial belief is that McGregor suffered a torn ACL. Until MRI results are released, however, the exact structures involved and the full severity of the injury remain unconfirmed.

As a physical therapist, I’m breaking down the injury frame by frame to show you the likely mechanism. We’ll look at the position of McGregor’s planted foot, the rotation occurring through the lower leg, the direction the knee collapsed and why this combination can place enormous stress on the ACL, MCL and meniscus.

I’ll also explain why an athlete can sometimes initially try to continue after an ACL injury, what additional damage doctors will be looking for and what a realistic recovery could mean for McGregor’s fighting future.

In an unbelievable twist, McGregor also tore his ACL during his original 2013 fight against Max Holloway. That night, he managed to finish the fight and earn a unanimous-decision victory. Thirteen years later, another knee injury against the same opponent brought his comeback to an abrupt and heartbreaking end.

This video is an educational analysis based on the visible injury mechanism and currently available reports. A definitive diagnosis can only be made following an examination and appropriate medical imaging.

videos.title: Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Best from day three at the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Saturday | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Saturday | Genesis Scottish Open | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Saturday at the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, featuring Rory Mcilroy, Matt Fitzpatrick, Wyndham Clark and Chris Gotterup, among others. After a fog delay pushed ahead Round 3 starting times, play was ultimately suspended due to fog before the completion of play. Round 3 will conclude Sunday.

The PGA TOUR heads across the Atlantic this week for the Genesis Scottish Open, where one of the strongest fields of the season assembles at The Renaissance Club for the final tune-up ahead of The Open Championship. Co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour, the event returns to the East Lothian venue for the eighth consecutive year. Defending champion Chris Gotterup arrives in Scotland riding plenty of momentum after winning the John Deere Classic, his third victory of the 2026 season, and will look to become the first player to successfully defend the Genesis Scottish Open title. Rory McIlroy also returns to one of his favourite venues, having finished T2, T4 and first over the past three editions, while World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler begins his Open Championship preparations after another remarkable season that has featured nine top-10 finishes in 14 starts. Major champions Aaron Rai and Wyndham Clark are also in the field, with Rai returning to the site of his 2020 victory and Clark looking to continue a superb run of form following his second U.S. Open title. Matt Fitzpatrick, Tommy Fleetwood and Scotland's own Robert MacIntyre further strengthen a field that features six of the world's top 10 players. With 500 FedExCup points on offer and many of the game's biggest names making their final competitive start before The Open Championship, the Genesis Scottish Open once again promises to deliver one of the highlights of the summer golf calendar.

videos.title: NEVER Eat Eggs Until You Know This | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
NEVER Eat Eggs Until You Know This | Dr. Mandell Eggs have been misunderstood for decades, and many people still avoid them because they’re afraid of cholesterol. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains the truth about eggs, cholesterol, and heart health, including why cholesterol is essential for every cell in your body, hormone production, vitamin D production, bile acids, brain health, and overall function. You’ll learn how the liver makes most of the cholesterol your body needs, why dietary cholesterol from eggs does not affect everyone the same way, and why the real problem is often not the egg itself but the overall lifestyle around it. Eggs provide high-quality protein, all nine essential amino acids, choline for brain and nerve health, lutein and zeaxanthin for eye support, vitamin A, vitamin D, vitamin B12, selenium, and many important nutrients found mostly in the yolk. This video also explains why you should look at the entire meal, not just the egg, because eggs eaten with vegetables, avocado, fruit, and whole foods are very different from eggs eaten with bacon, sausage, pastries, sugary cereals, fried potatoes, and processed foods. Dr. Mandell also discusses healthy ways to prepare eggs, including boiling, poaching, and gently scrambling, while avoiding burning or overcooking them. For most healthy people, eggs should not be feared, but people with familial hypercholesterolemia, certain medical conditions, or specific doctor recommendations should follow professional guidance. The goal is to stop fearing one natural food and start understanding the bigger picture of nutrition, movement, sleep, stress, blood sugar, metabolism, and heart health.

*********************************

videos.title: Why lower-body lead improves sequencing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why lower-body lead improves sequencing #golfswing #golftips Great players begin the downswing by leading with the lower body, creating separation between the hips and the upper body. That separation allows the club to shallow and sequence more efficiently into impact. This drill, often used by Dave Phillips, helps golfers feel the correct order and build better timing.
If downswing sequencing or shallowing feels difficult, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear structure to improve transition and strike consistency.

• Sleep quality

videos.title: Hickory golf clubs EXPOSED my golf faults!
videos.summary_source_text:
Hickory golf clubs EXPOSED my golf faults! What happens when you take 100 year old hickory golf clubs to Italy's number one golf course?

In this video, I put traditional hickory clubs to the test on one of the finest golf courses in Europe to see how they compare to modern equipment. From the tee shots to the approach shots, you'll discover the challenges, surprises, and lessons these historic clubs can teach today's golfers.

Many golfers believe modern technology is the key to better golf, but playing with hickory clubs quickly reveals the fundamentals of great ball striking, tempo, rhythm, and shot making. Along the way, I'll share what I learned, how these clubs performed under pressure, and whether there are any swing secrets modern golfers can take from the game’s past.

If you've ever wondered how golfers played the game a century ago, or whether old equipment can actually improve your understanding of the golf swing, this is a round you won't want to miss.

Let me know in the comments if you would try a round with hickory clubs and what golf challenge you'd like to see next.

In this video, I put traditional hickory clubs to the test on one of the finest golf courses in Europe to see how they compare to modern equipment. From the tee shots to the approach shots, you'll discover the challenges, surprises, and lessons these historic clubs can teach today's golfers.

Many golfers believe modern technology is the key to better golf, but playing with hickory clubs quickly reveals the fundamentals of great ball striking, tempo, rhythm, and shot making. Along the way, I'll share what I learned, how these clubs performed under pressure, and whether there are any swing secrets modern golfers can take from the game’s past.

If you've ever wondered how golfers played the game a century ago, or whether old equipment can actually improve your understanding of the golf swing, this is a round you won't want to miss.

videos.title: Dry. Your. Wedges. 💧Honestly, before we did this test, I didn’t dry mine, either.
videos.summary_source_text:
Dry. Your. Wedges. 💧Honestly, before we did this test, I didn’t dry mine, either. But, after seeing these results I don’t play without a towel on hand

Our wedge testing revealed some huge changes in spin rates and launch angles when moisture is introduced - affecting your distances.

You and I both know trusting your yardages is key to scoring.

👉🏾👉🏾👉🏾 Almost 100% of the shots you hit in a round of golf will have SOME moisture on either the club, ground or ball.

Consistent spin is very important can be the difference between a 5 ft putt and a 20-ft putt.

WET WEDGE DATA:
- 20 testers
- 18 wedges
- 17,000 shots
- @titleist Pro V1
- @foresightsports QC Quad

📍SPIN = 30% spin loss ⬇️
📍LAUNCH: 4.6 degree higher ⬆️

* The worst wedges in this test lost 60% spin
* The best wedge was the @PingTour Glide 4.0

THE TAKEAWAY:
If you are losing 65% spin, consistent distance control is unlikely. If your approach shot is not spinning, you’ll probably see your ball end up farther from the hole than you expect.

The good news is that the best-performing wedges are almost identical under wet conditions 🤝

Keep this in mind next time you’re in the market for a new wedge

Hope this helps 🙏🏽 But, after seeing these results I don’t play without a towel on hand

videos.title: ChatGPT’s Latest Update Is MASSIVE
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT’s Latest Update Is MASSIVE OpenAI just dropped not one but SIX huge new upgrades. Here's the breakdown of them all: 

- GPT-5.6: The new flagship model is faster, cheaper, and capable of building entire games, slide decks, and complex software from a single prompt.

- Sol, Terra, & Luna: GPT-5.6 now comes in three variants. You can slide between Sol (maximum power), Terra, and Luna (prioritizing speed and lower credit use) depending on your budget and task.

- The "Super App": OpenAI is combining ChatGPT, Codex, and their AI browser into 1 app. It has a new Work Mode feature that acts as an autonomous assistant that can scan your emails, calendar, Slack, and documents to prioritize and complete tasks for you.

- ChatGPT Sites: A new tool that lets you prompt full websites and apps into existence, handling everything from code and databases to hosting and publishing.

Which of these new features are you most excited to try first? Let me know in the comments! 👇

Tuck And Turn On-Plane Drill – Blue Brick Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Nothing gets you on plane faster than the tuck and turn drill.

This quick tip shows the full move: elbow starts out in the backswing, tucks in transition, and you turn on through — creating natural lag and getting the club coming from the inside every time.

After practicing this feel, your club will be swinging perfectly on plane, giving you more consistency and more speed through impact.

We used the Blue Brick to confirm the on-plane path during the drill.

If you've tried every upper body fix and still can't stop standing up through impact, the problem is probably starting from the ground. Eric Cogorno breaks down the lower body chain reaction — trail foot, trail knee, lead hip, upper body — that high handicap golfers get wrong and shows exactly how to fix it with one simple sequence. Watch how Adam Scott and Rory McIlroy use their trail knee and lead hip depth to stay down at impact, and how the alignment rod drill gives you the same feel immediately. If you leave this video without trying the trail toe drill, you're leaving consistency on the table.
What You'll Learn:

What You'll Learn:
• Why incorrect trail foot position causes thin shots, topped balls, and standing up through impact
• How the trail foot controls the knee, hip, and entire lower body chain reaction in the golf swing
• The trail toe fix: pushing off the inside of the big toe to keep the lead hip deep at impact
• The trail knee drill for closing the gap and training correct knee path through the ball
• Why lead hip depth is the real key to staying down at impact for high handicap golfers
• The four-step sequence: trail toe, trail knee, lead hip, upper body — layered piece by piece
• How Adam Scott and Rory McIlroy use trail knee and hip depth that most high handicap golfers never learn
• The alignment rod drill for training correct knee path so your lower body stops leaking toward the ball

If you've tried every upper body fix and still can't stop standing up through impact, the problem is probably starting from the ground. Eric Cogorno breaks down the lower body chain reaction — trail foot, trail knee, lead hip, upper body — that high handicap golfers get wrong and shows exactly how to fix it with one simple sequence. Watch how Adam Scott and Rory McIlroy use their trail knee and lead hip depth to stay down at impact, and how the alignment rod drill gives you the same feel immediately. If you leave this video without trying the trail toe drill, you're leaving consistency on the table.
What You'll Learn:

What You'll Learn:
• Why incorrect trail foot position causes thin shots, topped balls, and standing up through impact
• How the trail foot controls the knee, hip, and entire lower body chain reaction in the golf swing
• The trail toe fix: pushing off the inside of the big toe to keep the lead hip deep at impact
• The trail knee drill for closing the gap and training correct knee path through the ball
• Why lead hip depth is the real key to staying down at impact for high handicap golfers
• The four-step sequence: trail toe, trail knee, lead hip, upper body — layered piece by piece
• How Adam Scott and Rory McIlroy use trail knee and hip depth that most high handicap golfers never learn
• The alignment rod drill for training correct knee path so your lower body stops leaking toward the ball

videos.title: If You Struggle With Chipping, Just Do This Before Every Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
If You Struggle With Chipping, Just Do This Before Every Shot You can practise chipping for hours...

...and still stand over one simple shot wondering whether it's going to be thin, fat... or perfect.

That uncertainty destroys confidence around the greens.
One bad chip turns into two. Before long, you're trying to guide the club instead of trusting it.
The frustrating part is, you're probably trying to do exactly what feels natural.

And that's the very thing making chipping so difficult.

In this short game lesson, Danny Maude shows you the one chipping technique that works for 70–80% of chip shots around the green—from tight lies to thick rough. It's a simple change in the way you think about the shot that encourages your body to produce clean, consistent contact without filling your head with technical positions.

If you've ever struggled with fat chips, thin chips or simply lost confidence around the greens, I think this simple golf lesson could really help.

In this video you'll learn

✅ Why most golfers struggle with chipping (even after practising)

✅ The hidden mistake that causes fat and thin chip shots

✅ Why better golfers use loft very differently from amateurs

✅ A simple movement that almost forces great contact

✅ How to play the same technique from tight lies and rough

✅ Why changing the problem your body is trying to solve can transform your short game

If you enjoyed this lesson, you'll love my AI Golf Coach.

Simply record your golf swing and the app analyses your technique, identifies what's holding you back, then gives you the exact lesson and practice drill you need to improve.

No searching through hundreds of YouTube videos.

Just personalised coaching, exactly when you need it.

👉 Start your FREE 2-week trial here:
https://www.dannymaude.com/Swing-coach-app

You are just 2 minutes away from knowing the exact fault in your golf swing and how to fix it.

---

## ⏱ Chapters

00:00 Why chipping destroys confidence

00:32 The one chipping technique that works on most chip shots

01:20 The golf swing mistake causing fat and thin contact

02:50 Why positions aren't the answer

03:07 Why I want you to chip with a 60° wedge

05:18 Let your body solve the problem

06:32 The movement that creates crisp strikes

07:17 Simple short game setup adjustments

08:25 An easy fix if you tend to slice chips

09:23 How to hit higher shots with the same technique

09:44 Using the chipping technique from rough lies

11:02 Why patterns beat positions

📥 FREE PRACTICE GUIDE
You don’t have to remember everything from this golf lesson. I’ve put the key points into a free practice guide for you. You can download here: https://www.dannymaude.com/struggle-with-chipping-try-this

🏌️ WANT MORE PERSONALISED GOLF HELP?
If you’d like to learn more or you’d like more personalised advice from me, consider joining my online golfing community here:

○ Website: https://dannymaude.com

Inside, I’ll help you understand what’s really happening in your own golf swing and give you a clear plan to improve — so you’re not left guessing what to work on next.

Danny Maude

○ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dannymaude

BOOK A GOLF LESSON

Thanks for watching. I hope this simple hybrid and long iron lesson helps you strike the ball cleaner, hit the ball higher, create more effortless distance and enjoy your golf more. videos.title: What Happens When You Eat ONE Egg a Week for 3 Months (Incredible)
videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens When You Eat ONE Egg a Week for 3 Months (Incredible) Can eggs reduce Alzheimer’s risk by 47%? Eggs are excellent for cognitive health, but there’s more to the story. Discover the connection between eggs and Alzheimer’s disease, how eggs support brain health, and whether they’re a useful tool for dementia prevention.

0:00 Eggs and dementia
1:30 Egg and brain health
2:35 Choline and brain health
3:38 Lutein in eggs
4:09 What is Alzheimer’s?
6:35 Egg nutrition facts
7:08 Eggs and cholesterol
8:42 Pasture-raised eggs vs. conventional eggs

🌟 Download Dr. Berg’s Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4aOzXWV

Watch these next for more on brain health and dementia prevention: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/fM-pyJQKwiI
▶️ https://youtu.be/OErFtjHismU
▶️ https://youtu.be/XHNOAvhkr5Q

Check out this article for more ways to support memory and cognitive health: https://www.drberg.com/blog/brain-detox

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

When new research is presented, it’s important to look beyond the headlines. Read the study carefully, see what the researchers are actually comparing, and ask questions like who funded the research.

Eggs contain more than 850 proteins and are one of the richest dietary sources of choline. Just two eggs provide about 300 mg of choline.

Choline is an essential building block for acetylcholine, a neurotransmitter that supports communication between neurons. Many Alzheimer’s medications work by slowing the breakdown of acetylcholine. Eggs also contain lutein, another important nutrient that supports brain health and cognitive health.

Eggs are true brain food, providing high-quality protein, choline, lutein, B vitamins, folate, iodine, selenium, trace minerals, and omega-3 fatty acids. These nutrients support brain health and may play a role in dementia prevention.

DATA:
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38782209/ 
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31360988/ 
https://www.researchgate.net/publication/309386080_Glucose_and_Ketone_Metabolism_in_the_Aging_Brain_Implications_for_Therapeutic_Strategies_to_Delay_the_Progression_of_Alzheimer's_Disease
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26054031/ 
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15673620/  
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27710141/
https://nyaspubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/nyas.12999 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4937039/
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7142997/ 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5487843/

videos.title: 1998 vs 2023 Driver... How much have they changed 🤔
videos.summary_source_text:
1998 vs 2023 Driver... How much have they changed 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Duffing Your Chip Shots the Basics Use these golf short game basics to give yourself the best possible platform from which to hit better chip shots and get up and down more often. 

Lots of amateurs hit bad chip / pitch shots due to poor fundamentals which encourage them to strike their shots poorly. Strike your short game shots like a pro and increase your control around the greens with these easy-to-follow short game tips.
